languages.text: "Я — воин на защите царства Его. Я Меч, Щит и Молот Империума. Прегрешения мои будут искуплены в служении Ему..."
languages.translation_comment: Сначала барк говорит мейнчарактер (Батошски или Дунавски), потом его повторяют все собравшиеся гвардейцы

languages.text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."
languages.original_text: "Я — воин на защите царства Его. Я Меч, Щит и Молот Империума. Прегрешения мои будут искуплены в служении Ему..."

traits.locale_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."
"I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."
"I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

languages.text: 「私は彼の領土を守る戦士である。私は帝国の剣、盾、ハンマーである。私の罪は彼の奉仕によって償われる…」
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

traits.locale_text: 「私は彼の領土を守る戦士である。私は帝国の剣、盾、ハンマーである。私の罪は彼の奉仕によって償われる…」

languages.text: “我是捍卫祂疆域的战士。我是帝国的利剑，是坚盾，亦是重锤。我所犯下的过错，都将通过对祂的侍奉来赎清……”
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

traits.locale_text: “我是捍卫祂疆域的战士。我是帝国的利剑，是坚盾，亦是重锤。我所犯下的过错，都将通过对祂的侍奉来赎清……”

languages.text: "Ich bin ein Krieger, der Sein Reich verteidigt. Ich bin Schwert, Schild und Hammer des Imperiums. In seinem Dienst werde ich für meine Verbrechen Sühne leisten ..."
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin ein Krieger, der Sein Reich verteidigt. Ich bin Schwert, Schild und Hammer des Imperiums. In seinem Dienst werde ich für meine Verbrechen Sühne leisten ..."

languages.text: « Je suis un guerrier qui défend Son domaine. Je suis l'épée, le bouclier et le marteau de l'Imperium. J'expierai mes péchés à Son service... »
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis un guerrier qui défend Son domaine. Je suis l'épée, le bouclier et le marteau de l'Imperium. J'expierai mes péchés à Son service... »

languages.text: «Soy guerrero en defensa de Sus dominios. Soy la Espada, el Escudo y el Martillo del Imperium. Expiaré mis transgresiones a Su servicio...».
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."

traits.locale_text: «Soy guerrero en defensa de Sus dominios. Soy la Espada, el Escudo y el Martillo del Imperium. Expiaré mis transgresiones a Su servicio...».

languages.text: "Ben, O'nun egemenliğinin savunucusu olan bir savaşçıyım. Ben İmparatorluk'un Kılıcı, Kalkanı ve Çekici'yim. Günahlarım, O'nun hizmetinde kefaret bulacak..."
languages.original_text: "I am a warrior in defence of His dominion. I am the Sword, Shield and Hammer of the Imperium. My transgressions shall be atoned for in His service..."
